title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese outlines three strategies for maximizing Claude Code productivity: LLM knowledge bases, auto-research, and context engineering. The video frames these as methods used by Andrej Karpathy to improve output velocity.
